description_long: This is a rectangular, light wood cabinet with a modern, minimalist design. The front features two large side compartments with flat panel doors and a central open shelving section with two horizontal shelves. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving it a natural and clean appearance. The back is plain, with visible mounting brackets, suggesting it could be secured to a wall. The top and sides are flat and unadorned, emphasizing its geometric form. There are no visible handles or decorative elements, reinforcing its sleek, contemporary style.
description: A light wood, rectangular cabinet with two side doors and central open shelves, featuring a minimalist, modern design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the solid, flat wood panel with no visible openings or features.
description_view_1: Front view displaying two large side doors and a central open shelving section with two shelves.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, identical to view 0, showing a plain wood panel.
description_view_3: Rear view with plain wood panels and visible mounting brackets for wall attachment.
